examples: He is now the proud possessor of a driving licence.
Ms. Nova is the proud possessor of a truly incredible voice.
View allows the possessor to view key attributes.
Would that nice Mr Obama, the precocious possessor of a Nobel peace prize, really be so duplicitous?
He has formidable intellectual powers: possessor of a first-class degree, ex-president of the Oxford Union, and an ex-consultant with McKinsey.
